# Prime candidates for RSA 2048 key generation, one per line, in big endian hex.
# This file contains two primes, one of which is at the end of the file.
# The totients of the primes are coprime with 65537. Every candidate is 7 mod 8.
#
# The number of composites and the distribution of their small divisors are
# chosen to be representative of the expected average key generation run, to
# provide a useful benchmark target.
#
# https://c2sp.org/CCTV/keygen#rsa-key-generation-benchmark
# https://words.filippo.io/rsa-keygen-bench/
